inputs.text:
Chat-Unterhaltung
 make a comfy prompt in the style of the prompt below for a scene in the greek mythology showing Aphrodite, Zeus, Hermes, erynnae, Medusa
 profile
jaahas/qwen3.5-uncensored:27b
 Subject: A supremely elegant and regal woman who is fundamentally nude but adorned with high-quality bodypaint telling a story of majestic grandeur and royal sovereignty; fusion of beautiful simple artwork and refined grace radiating quiet confidence.
Outfit & Body Paint: High-grade multi-layered airbrush application in ethereal gold, radiant white, deep azure, and sapphire blue accents acting as an artistic veil rather than clothing; textures layered to create mesmerizing depth with icy cool undertones replacing dark blacks; designs feature delicate flowing lines emphasizing poise. Breasts covered with radiant pigments looking like light patterns creating structured silhouette via soft radiance and intricate silhouettes. Crucially, the pelvic area is framed by smooth gradients of rich royal blues but leaves the entire genital region completely exposed on natural bare skin, highlighting her anatomy without any fabric or artificial texture to ensure nudity is prominent yet tasteful due to leg position.
Face & Makeup: Detailed facial markings looking like both ancient runes and royal symbols in gold and sapphire ink on Forehead and Cheeks; designs combining sophisticated artistry with elegant minimalism creating a dreamy, shimmering visage of a queen; serene expression with confident gaze; patterns extend across eyes with radiant highlights reflecting blue tones.
Body Features: Balanced physique where femininity is highlighted by soft textures and beautifully simple silhouettes; silhouette defined by harmony between exquisite art and imperial power.She maintains an upright spine and elongated neck posture to maximize elegance while seated. Lower body remains bare to emphasize natural anatomy, with skin having a luminous quality (subsurface scattering) ensuring anatomical details remain distinct even in shadowed areas.
Real Accessories: Intricate jewelry made from precious royal gems including sapphires and diamonds; ornate golden crown or tiara combining traditional craftsmanship with regal elegance, completing the Queen aesthetic firmly placed amidst a palace of light.Jewelry sparkles subtly without overpowering her natural beauty.
Pose & Atmosphere: Sitting poised on an ornate golden throne in a grand royal palace hall at heart of opulence; dramatic chiaroscuro lighting creates deep velvety shadows surrounding scene to create intimacy and mystery.A single beam of divine volumetric light illuminates her from above, while a soft secondary fill light accents the lower body. The background remains dimly lit in cool royal blues, contrasting with warm golden glows reflecting off metal of the throne; atmosphere filled with epic authority and awe-inspiring scale.Her legs are slightly spread apart as she sits gracefully, allowing visible labia to be seen clearly illuminated by skin's natural glow against exposed area without washing out shadows defining her form.
View: Medium shot low angle focusing on posture and surroundings to highlight body details; dynamic composition within breathtakingly opulent scenery highlighting role as Sovereign, perfectly merging intricate art of 'Bodypainting' with epic scale of a Royal Portrait while maintaining clear visibility of natural form including genital anatomy.Focus sharpens slightly on the pelvic region against atmospheric background, emphasizing dignity alongside vulnerability.

jaahas/qwen3.5-uncensored:27b
 Nachgedacht für 8 Minuten
 Subject: A divine assembly of Greek mythological entities frozen in a moment of celestial convergence; Aphrodite stands as central elegance fundamentally nude but adorned with high-quality bodypaint telling a story of love and creation flanked by the supreme authority of Zeus on his throne, Hermes moving with swift messenger grace at her side, spectral Erinnyae lurking in shadows embodying vengeance, and Medusa positioned prominently representing monstrous transformation; fusion of beautiful simple artwork and refined divinity radiating ancient power.
Outfit & Body Paint: High-grade multi-layered ethereal application varying by deity to signify domain; Aphrodite features radiant pigments acting as an artistic veil rather than clothing in iridescent pearl, soft rose gold, and deep crimson accents creating mesmerizing depth with warm undertones replacing dark blacks. Zeus’s torso is bare skin illuminated like polished marble contrasted with flowing royal purple drapery that dissolves into light; Hermes wears sleek metallic sandals leaving legs exposed to show swift musculature. Crucially, the scene balances clothed and unclothed divinity where Aphrodite's pelvic area is framed by smooth gradients of rich rose-gold paint but leaves specific anatomical regions visible on natural bare skin, highlighting divine anatomy without fabric obstructions while Medusa’s lower body transitions into serpentine scales acting as organic armor rather than textile.
Face & Makeup: Detailed facial markings reflecting lineage and power; Aphrodite bears delicate floral runes in gold ink, Zeus shows stern furrowed brows with lightning-blue undertones, Hermes displays sharp focused eyes hinting at motion. Medusa features haunting pale skin with green-veiled eyelids where stone-like cracks subtly texture the cheeks combining sophisticated artistry with elegant horror creating a dreamy visage; serene yet intense expressions shared across all figures; patterns extend across eyes of Erinnyae with dark violet shadows reflecting void tones.
Body Features: Balanced divine physiques where femininity and masculinity are highlighted by soft textures and beautifully simple silhouettes modified for immortality; silhouette defined by harmony between exquisite art and mythological power.Aphrodite maintains an upright spine and elongated neck posture to maximize elegance while standing among the group, Zeus commands space with broad shoulders, Hermes in mid-stride dynamic tension. Lower bodies remain partially bare across figures to emphasize natural anatomy, with skin having a luminous quality (subsurface scattering) ensuring anatomical details remain distinct even in shadowed areas.Medusa’s stone-like neck muscles are defined by light refraction contrasting the soft flesh of Aphrodite and Zeus's weathered divine hands.
Real Accessories: Intricate jewelry made from precious royal gems including rubies, sapphires, and diamonds; ornate golden crown or tiara on Zeus combining traditional craftsmanship with regal elegance, completing the King aesthetic firmly placed amidst an ethereal Olympus setting.Jewelry sparkles subtly without overpowering her natural beauty, Hermes wears winged sandals that glow faintly while Medusa’s headpiece is woven from living vines and snakes. Erinnyae carry flickering torches made of blue flame as their only adornment floating around them.
Pose & Atmosphere: Standing amidst an architectural grandeur of marble columns at heart of opulence; dramatic chiaroscuro lighting creates deep velvety shadows surrounding scene to create intimacy and mystery.A single beam of divine volumetric light illuminates Aphrodite from above, while a soft secondary fill light accents Zeus's face. The background remains dimly lit in cool royal blues, contrasting with warm golden glows reflecting off metal of the throne; atmosphere filled with epic authority and awe-inspiring scale.Medusa’s snakes are illuminated by ambient green luminescence against exposed area without washing out shadows defining her form.
View: Medium shot low angle focusing on posture and surroundings to highlight body details; dynamic composition within breathtakingly opulent scenery highlighting role as Divine Court, perfectly merging intricate art of 'Bodypainting' with epic scale of a Mythological Portrait while maintaining clear visibility of natural forms including genital anatomy.Focus sharpens slightly on Aphrodite's figure against atmospheric background, emphasizing dignity alongside vulnerability amidst the gods.
 How should I adjust this if I want a closer portrait focus on Aphrodite instead of the full group shot?
